name: Grave March
description:
Command your |cFFFFFFFFUndead|r to focus their attacks on the target enemy.

Usable while casting or channeling.

name: Bone Ward
Raise: Crypt Fiend
description:
Raise a |cffffffffCrypt Fiend|r to aid you in combat, occupying 2 |cffffffffLife Force|r.

|cff90ee90Command|r: Shoots barbs at your target that deal 35 Frost damage and bounce to a nearby enemy.

name: Undead: Pacify
description:
Your undead minions assume a passive behavior and will not attack enemies or cast spells.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffUndead Stance|r can be active at a time.:ext@

name: Undead: Protect
description:
Your undead minions assume a defensive behavior, increasing threat and Armor.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffUndead Stance|r can be active at a time.:ext@

name: Scourge Apprentice Training
description: Your |cffffffffLife Force|r is increased by 1.

name: Raise: Greater Skeletal Warrior
description:
Raise a |cffffffffGreater Skeletal Warrior|r to aid you in combat, occupying 1 |cffffffffLife Force|r.

|cff90ee90Command|r: Strikes an enemy in front of it and deals Weapon Damage plus 2, reducing their Armor by 10% for 15 sec, stacking 2 times.

name: Undead: Assault
description:
Your undead minions assume an aggresive behaviour, increasing movement speed by 50%.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffUndead Stance|r can be active at a time.:ext@

name: Create Bone Reliquary
description:
Create 1 |cffffffffBone Reliquary|r that restores 30% of your missing health.

Allies may only use a |cffffffffBone Reliquary|r once per minute. Shares a cooldown with similar effects.

name: Call of The Scourge
description:
Bring a dead ally back to life with 70 health and 135 mana.

Can be used in combat.

name: Unholy Frenzy
description: Enrage your Undead minions for 15 sec, increasing their haste by 30% and movement speed by 50%.

name: Create Bone Reliquary
description:
Create 2 |cffffffffBone Reliquaries|r that restores 30% of your missing health.

Allies may only use a |cffffffffBone Reliquary|r once per minute. Shares a cooldown with similar effects.

name: Call of The Scourge
description:
Bring a dead ally back to life with 145 health and 273 mana.

Can be used in combat.

name: Raise: Skeletal Rogue
description:
Raise a |cffffffffSkeletal Rogue|r to aid you in combat, occupying 1 |cffffffffLife Force|r. 

Has a chance to apply |cffffffffDecaying Poison|r on hit, reducing the target's casting speed by 10% for 6 sec, stacking 3 times.

|cff90ee90Command|r: Leaps to your target and strikes it 2 to 5 times. Always strikes 5 times on enemies below 35% health.

description:

Allies may only use a |cffffffffBone Reliquary|r once per minute. Shares a cooldown with similar effects.

description:
Bring a dead ally back to life with 253 health and 447 mana.

Can be used in combat.

name: Gravebound Champion
description:
Summon a |cffffffffGravebound Champion|r that redirects 50% of all damage the caster takes to themselves for 20 sec.

@ext:Shares a 3min cooldown with other |cffffffffChampion|r spells.:ext@

name: Animate: Skeletal Smith
description: Animate a |cFFFFFFFFSkeletal Smith|r that can repair the equipment of allies for 1 min.

name: Crypt Swarm
description: Channel a swarm of locusts on an enemy, dealing 25 Shadow damage slowing their movement speed by 30%, and generating Runic Power over 2.90 sec.

name: Sacrifice Undead
description: Sacrifices your Undead, returning their |cffffffffLife Force|r to you, and restoring 139 health for each Undead minion destroyed.

description: Empowers an ally with a dark Mandate, increasing Stamina by 8 for 30 min.

name: Harvest Plague
description:
Disease an enemy, siphoning 30 health every 3 sec for 18 sec, healing you for a portion of the damage dealt.

The plague intensifies and siphons increased health based on how close to death your target is.

name: Ghoulify
description: Transform an enemy into a ghoul, fearing them for 40 sec (8 sec vs. players). Only usable on Humanoids. Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

description: Channel a swarm of locusts on an enemy, dealing 75 Shadow damage slowing their movement speed by 30%, and generating Runic Power over 2.90 sec.

@ext:Periodic damage dealt by this can critically strike.:ext@

name: Blight
description:
The target becomes blighted, causing nearby enemies to suffer 114 Shadow damage over 20 sec.

After 20 sec, the blight expunges from the target dealing 93 Nature damage.

description: Cause a corpse to explode for 145 Plague damage to all enemies within 10 yds. Will use a nearby corpse if the target is not a corpse. Does not affect mechanical or elemental corpses.
